steps.instruction: Opening the EPFO Member e-SEWA (UAN) portal
Log in with your UAN and password. Enter these yourself; I will never see them.
Selecting the online claim (Form 19/10C/31) and confirming your name as per records
Confirm your seeded bank account and enter the OTP sent to your Aadhaar-linked mobile to verify the withdrawal.
Review the claim type and amount, then submit the claim yourself. Note the claim tracking ID.
